text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Even the atmosphere here feels different! As
expected of the vaunted G1 moniker.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hang on, I know what'll help. My mother taught
me a breathing exercise back when I was still an
actor.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's great for getting rid of nerves, so let's do it
together.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
First, set your feet shoulder-width apart and
place your hands on your stomach. Then focus on
breathing with your stomach.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Breathe in through your nose... and breathe out.
Good, just like that!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Breathe in... Breathe out... Hehe. I guess I was a
little nervous too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can hear the din of the crowd over the quiet
sound of our synced breathing.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Right, how was that? Do you feel better now?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Great! On that note, I'll be off now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're excited for the show I'm about to
put on.
